title: cross_sectional_result_object_nonflattened
description: An object returning the results for a single formula.

universe.description: If `universe` is submitted instead of `ids`, then the universe attribute will display the universe expression requested.

dataItemName.description: Name of data item (requestId, requested Screening formula, or fsymId)

dataType.description: Data type of the data item

error.description:
Data item error indicator.
 * Zero  success
 * Non-zero  failure

errorMessage.description: If error is non-zero, errorMessage will display the Screening formula error.

warnings.description: Screening formula warnings. This attribute is only displayed if warnings are generated in the execution of the Screening formula.
